project.title: Order 28341 - Carla Miro Vinyals 2022-05-09
project.projectDescription: HeLa treated with IAA or NEM (Figure S3). Stable cell line expressing GALT1-HA-sCGrx1p sensor protein were treated with 20 mM NEM (A) or IAA (B) for 30 min at 37°C. The processed samples are anti-HA magnetic beads with the sensor protein captured from whole cell lysate.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Beads were washed twice with 100 µl of digestion buffer (10 mM Tris, 2 mM CaCl2, pH 8.2) and wash was discarded. Afterwards 45 µl of digestion buffer and 5 µl trypsin solution (100 ng/µl in 10 mM HCl) were added. Microwave assisted digestion was performed at 60°C for 30 min. Supernatants were collected and remaining peptides were extracted from beads using 50 µl digest buffer and joined. For the resulting 100 ul sample 1.8 ul TCEP (100 mM) was added and incubate for 30 min at 30°C, than 2.8 ul IAA (500 mM) was added to sample A and again incubate 30 min at RT in the dark. For samples B alkylation was performed by adding 5 ul NEM (100 mM). Both samples were dried to completeness, redissolved in 20 ul 0.1% FA  and diluted 1: 50 prior to injection.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Raw LC-MS data was processed in the Skyline Targeted Mass Spec Environment.
